title: Add Hindi and English language support with paragraph-based organization

requirements.summary: Add language selection support for Hindi and English in the recording interface
acceptanceCriteria: Recording interface includes a language selector with Hindi and English options
Selected language is stored with each recording in the backend
Language selection persists across recording sessions

file_operations.description: Add language selector dropdown above class selector with Hindi and English options. Store selected language in component state, persist to localStorage, and pass language value to createRecording mutation. The language selector should use the Language enum from backend.d.ts.
Update createRecording mutation to accept language parameter (Language enum) and pass it to backend createRecording method along with classLabel, externalBlob, and paragraphNumber.

acceptanceCriteria: Backend data model includes paragraph identification for recordings
Users can specify which paragraph a recording belongs to during recording
Recordings can be filtered and displayed by paragraph in the playback interface
Paragraph organization works alongside the existing 2-7 class structure

file_operations.description: Add paragraph number input field below the language selector. Store paragraph number in component state (default to 1n), persist to localStorage, and pass paragraphNumber (as bigint) to createRecording mutation.

Add paragraph-based filtering UI with dropdown or input field to filter recordings by paragraph number. Display paragraph number badge for each recording item. When filtering by paragraph, call getRecordingsByParagraph backend method.

Add useRecordingsByParagraph query hook that calls backend getRecordingsByParagraph method. Add useRecordingsByClassAndLanguage query hook that calls backend getRecordingsByClassAndLanguage method for combined filtering.

requirements.summary: Enhance the RecordingInterface component with language selector and paragraph number input
acceptanceCriteria: Language dropdown with Hindi and English options is displayed above the class selector
Paragraph number input field allows users to enter or select paragraph numbers
Selected language and paragraph are sent with recording data on upload
UI follows the existing warm, accessible design theme

file_operations.description: Add language selector (Select component from shadcn/ui) with options for Hindi and English above the class selector. Add paragraph number input (Input component from shadcn/ui with type=number, min=1) below the language selector. Update the recording upload flow to include language and paragraphNumber when calling createRecording. Persist both selections to localStorage for next session.

requirements.summary: Update RecordingsList to display language and paragraph information with filtering
acceptanceCriteria: Recording list items show language badge (Hindi/English) and paragraph number
Users can filter recordings by language
Users can filter recordings by paragraph number
Filtering works in conjunction with existing class-based tabs

file_operations.description: Add language badge and paragraph number display to each recording list item. Add language filter dropdown (Hindi/English/All) above the class tabs. Add paragraph filter input field or dropdown next to language filter. Update filtering logic to call getRecordingsByLanguage, getRecordingsByParagraph, or getRecordingsByClassAndLanguage based on active filters. Display language using Badge component from shadcn/ui with distinct colors for Hindi vs English.
Add useRecordingsByLanguage query hook that calls backend getRecordingsByLanguage method. Ensure all new query hooks properly invalidate cache on recording creation or deletion.
